prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约22340→16165→17423→18230→18095，整体呈先升后稳走势，2022年大幅前移后近3年基本在17400–18200区间波动；2025 年基准约18095名；该校在陕西省物理类招生计划2021–2025年均为23人，2026年增至33人，扩招约43.5%，竞争压力理论上有所缓解，但扩招幅度较大对 位次有后移推力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第77名，近年排名稳定在72–81区间，属中上水平211；2024年声誉偏负面（ 校内安全事件），但影响范围有限；抖音热度总排名第88位、评价为“一般”，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；无投档断档记录；第五轮 学科评估中化学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；招生专业中化学、过程装备与控制工程、食品科学与工程等与化学学科关联，但整体优势学科覆盖面较窄。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 福州大学位于福建省，属东南沿海地区，对陕西省考生有一定地域吸 引力但非首选热门；该校在陕招生占比约1.8%（2025年），属外省招生正常比例；电气工程及其自动化（2024年高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）等专业社会热度持续升温，可能吸引更多高分考生报考该校相关专业；陕西省2026年物理类考生约2 06500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，全省竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+43.5%）与全省考生增加（+19.7%）的双向作用，扩招 对位次的后移推力大于考生增加带来的竞争加剧效应；但电气、电子信息等热门专业热度上升可能吸引更多高分考生，部分抵消扩招影响。预计2026年最低位次约22615名，区间2 2115–23115名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 22340 → 16165 → 17423 → 18230 → 18095, showing an overall trend of rising first and then stabilizing. After a significant forward shift in 2022, the ranking has fluctuated within the 17400–18200 range in recent three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 18095. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shaanxi Province was 23 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and it will increase to 33 students in 2026, an expansion of about 43.5%. Theoretically, competition pressure is somewhat alleviated, but the large expansion exerts a backward push on the ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 77th in 2026, with a stable ranking in the 72–81 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. In 2024, its reputation was slightly negative due to a campus safety incident, but the impact was limited. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 88th with a rating of 'average', indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms without abnormal signals in application popularity. There is no record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university. Among the enrollment majors, Chemistry, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, and Food Science and Engineering are related to the Chemistry discipline, but the overall coverage of advantageous disciplines is relatively narrow.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, a southeastern coastal area, which has some regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates but is not the top choice. The university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.8% (2025), which is normal for an out-of-province university. Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended in 2024), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended) have continuously rising social popularity, potentially attracting more high-scoring candidates to apply for related majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shaanxi Province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition across the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the dual effects of a significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+43.5%) and an increase in provincial candidates (+19.7%), the backward push on ranking from the expansion is greater than the intensified competition effect from the candidate increase. However, the rising popularity of hot majors like Electrical Engineering and Electronic Information may attract more high-scoring candidates, partially offsetting the expansion's impact. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 22615, with a range of 22115–23115.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted ranking for Physics Category is about 22615, with a range of 22115–23115. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 21000) can prioritize hot majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation and Software Engineering. Candidates near the upper limit of the range should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类（含文科）最低位次约2609→2578→2437→2627→2617，近5年位次高度稳定在2437–2627区间，波动幅度极小；2025年基准约2617名；该校在陕西省历史类招生计划2021–2025年均为4人，2026年增至7人，扩招75%；招生专业从仅汉语言文学1个增至汉语言文学、英语、市场营销3个，专业选择显著增 加。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 汉语言文学（2023年推荐，偏热）社会热度稳定，考公考编优势 明显；英语（一般观望）、市场营销（明显劝退）热度偏低；陕西省2026年历史类考生约88500人，较2025年75641人增加约17.0%，全省竞争加剧；福州大学位于福建省，属东南沿海地区，对陕西文科考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在陕历史类招生占比极小（约0.07%），属外省补充性招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+75%）与全省考生增加（+17%）的双向作用，扩招幅度远超考生增幅，理论上位次应明显后移；但历史类招生基数极小（从4人增至7人），绝对增量仅 3人，且新增英语、市场营销专业热度偏低，对高分考生吸引力有限。预计2026年最低位次约3745名，区间3245–4245名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 2609 → 2578 → 2437 → 2627 → 2617. Over the past 5 years, the ranking has been highly stable within the 2437–2627 range, with minimal fluctuation. The 2025 baseline is approximately 2617. The enrollment plan for History Category in Shaanxi Province was 4 students each year from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 7 students in 2026, an expansion of 75%. The majors offered have expanded from only Chinese Language and Literature to include Chinese Language and Literature, English, and Marketing, significantly increasing major choices.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 77th, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with strong appeal to liberal arts candidates. In 2024, its reputation was slightly negative (due to a campus safety incident), but the impact was limited. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 88th with a rating of 'average', showing no abnormal signals in application popularity. There are no records of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemistry was rated A-, but the History Category majors (Chinese Language and Literature, English, Marketing) are not directly related to Chemistry. The university's overall strength in liberal arts is not a prominent advantage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language and Literature (recommended in 2023, relatively popular) has stable social popularity, with clear advantages for civil service and public institution exams. English (generally wait-and-see) and Marketing (clearly discouraged) have lower popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Shaanxi Province is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% from 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition across the province. Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, a southeastern coastal area, which has some regional appeal to Shaanxi liberal arts candidates. The university's enrollment in History Category in Shaanxi is very small (about 0.07%), making it a supplementary enrollment from other provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of a significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+75%) and an increase in provincial candidates (+17%), the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, theoretically leading to a noticeable backward shift in ranking. However, the base number of History Category enrollment is very small (from 4 to 7 students), with an absolute increase of only 3 students. Additionally, the newly added English and Marketing majors have low popularity, limiting appeal to high-scoring candidates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 3745, with a range of 3245–4245.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the predicted ranking for History Category is approximately 3745, with a range of 3245–4245. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to prioritize Chinese Language and Literature as the main sprint major. Those near the upper limit of the range may consider English as a backup. Marketing has low popularity and is recommended as a safety option.
